auth.heroTitle: Keep materials, movements, and alerts visible in one workspace.
auth.heroDescription: Use a single console to review suppliers, monitor stock levels, inspect movement history, and follow accountability when operations change.

heroCards.clarityDescription: Stock, alerts, and movement signals stay visible without forcing operators to jump between pages.
heroCards.traceDescription: Daily work remains attributable through movement records, stocktaking logs, and user-based actions.
heroCards.deliveryDescription: The frontend runs on the existing API set, which makes it suitable for coursework demos and portfolio presentation.

common.error: Request failed, please try again later

suppliers.title: Suppliers
suppliers.description: View supplier information in one place and add new suppliers when needed.
suppliers.createDescription: Fill in supplier basics for later material linking and procurement tracking.
suppliers.name: Name

materials.title: Materials
materials.description: Filter materials by name, category, and supplier, and monitor inventory status.
materials.createDescription: Fill in material basics for movements, alerts, and stocktaking.
materials.name: Name

materialDetail.title: Material Detail
materialDetail.recordsDescription: Only movement history for this material is shown.
materialDetail.notFound: Material not found. Please return to the list and choose again.
materialDetail.loadFailed: Failed to load material detail. Please try again later.

movements.title: Movements
movements.description: Filter movement records by material, type, and date range.
movements.createDescription: Submit a new movement and refresh the latest records.

alerts.title: Alerts
alerts.description: Only unresolved alerts are shown. Resolved alerts are removed from the list immediately.
alerts.empty: No unresolved alerts, inventory looks healthy

stocktaking.title: Stocktaking
stocktaking.description: Browse stocktaking records and open a detail page for items and confirmation.
stocktaking.periodTooLong: Period must be no longer than 20 characters
stocktaking.addItemDescription: Enter both book quantity and actual quantity.
stocktaking.detailDescription: Stocktaking items will be used to update inventory on confirmation.
stocktaking.confirmWarning: Confirming will update inventory to actual quantity and cannot be undone.
stocktaking.alreadyConfirmed: This stocktaking record has already been confirmed

reports.title: Monthly Report
reports.description: View monthly inbound and outbound summaries.

users.title: Users
users.description: Browse user accounts, create staff accounts, and update passwords.
users.createDescription: The system creates staff accounts by default and does not maintain roles on the frontend.
